instruction: In /tmp/test_files_hard, compress only .log and .txt files that were modified at least 30 days ago into .gz files in place. Exclude anything under archive/. Keep newer files unchanged. Then create /tmp/test_files_hard/compress_report.txt listing each compressed file relative path (without .gz), sorted alphabetically.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

parameters.command:
rm -rf /tmp/test_files_hard; mkdir -p /tmp/test_files_hard/app/a /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b /tmp/test_files_hard/archive/old /tmp/test_files_hard/misc; printf 'oldlog
' > /tmp/test_files_hard/app/a/error.log; printf 'oldtxt
' > /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b/report.txt; printf 'newlog
' > /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b/recent.log; printf 'oldcsv
' > /tmp/test_files_hard/misc/data.csv; printf 'archived
' > /tmp/test_files_hard/archive/old/ignore.log; touch -d '45 days ago' /tmp/test_files_hard/app/a/error.log /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b/report.txt /tmp/test_files_hard/misc/data.csv /tmp/test_files_hard/archive/old/ignore.log; touch -d '5 days ago' /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b/recent.log

command: import pyautogui, time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl','alt','t'); time.sleep(0.5)

result.command: error_gz='false'; [ -f /tmp/test_files_hard/app/a/error.log.gz ] && error_gz='true'; report_gz='false'; [ -f /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b/report.txt.gz ] && report_gz='true'; no_recent='false'; [ ! -f /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b/recent.log.gz ] && no_recent='true'; recent_kept='false'; [ -f /tmp/test_files_hard/app/b/recent.log ] && recent_kept='true'; no_csv_gz='false'; [ ! -f /tmp/test_files_hard/misc/data.csv.gz ] && no_csv_gz='true'; no_archive_gz='false'; [ ! -f /tmp/test_files_hard/archive/old/ignore.log.gz ] && no_archive_gz='true'; expected_report=$(printf 'app/a/error.log\napp/b/report.txt\n'); actual_report=$(cat /tmp/test_files_hard/compress_report.txt 2>/dev/null); report_ok='false'; [ "$actual_report" = "$expected_report" ] && report_ok='true'; echo "error_gz=$error_gz"; echo "report_gz=$report_gz"; echo "no_recent=$no_recent"; echo "recent_kept=$recent_kept"; echo "no_csv_gz=$no_csv_gz"; echo "no_archive_gz=$no_archive_gz"; echo "report_ok=$report_ok"
